titles.title: Where Does My Help Come From

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lift up my eyes to the hills Where does my help come from My help comes from the Lord Maker of Heaven and earth O Maker of Heaven and earth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your foot shall never be moved You'll never stumble Or slip no never He who watches Israel He never slumbers or sleeps No He never slumbers or sleeps

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The Lord will keep you from harm He watches over your soul He will watch you come and go Now and forevermore forever Now and forevermore

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lift up my eyes to the hills Where does my help come from My help comes from the Lord Maker of Heaven and earth O Maker of Heaven and earth O Maker of Heaven and earth O Maker of Heaven and earth
